name: Witchcrafter Unit Furnacer
desc:
2 Spellcaster monsters, including a "Witchcrafter" monster
During your Main Phase: You can discard 1 card; draw 2 cards.
During your Main Phase: You can discard 1 card; send 1 "Witchcrafter" card from your Deck to the GY.
You can only use each effect of "Witchcrafter Unit Furnacer" once per turn.
strings: [Monster] Discard 1 card, send 1 Witchcrafter card from Deck to GY
